description: Cross-account financial view for Juanes showing deposits received from Ivonne and expenses made on Ivonne's behalf, with all-time and yearly summaries, monthly breakdown table, and filtered transaction lists. Access restricted to Juanes only.

subDeliverables.title: Database functions for cross-account access
subDeliverables.description: Two PostgreSQL functions: get_ivonne_deposits (SECURITY INVOKER, returns Juanes' own deposits) and get_ivonne_expenses (SECURITY DEFINER, returns Ivonne's expenses bypassing RLS with Juanes-only guard). Public schema wrappers for PostgREST.
acceptanceCriteria: get_ivonne_deposits returns deposits for auth.uid()
get_ivonne_expenses returns expenses under Ivonne's user_id
get_ivonne_expenses raises exception if caller is not Juanes
Public wrappers delegate to schema-qualified functions
Migration file: 00008_juanes_tab_functions.sql

subDeliverables.title: RPC query wrappers
subDeliverables.description: TypeScript functions in queries.ts that call supabase.rpc() for both database functions.
acceptanceCriteria: getIvonneDeposits calls rpc('get_ivonne_deposits')
getIvonneExpenses calls rpc('get_ivonne_expenses')

subDeliverables.title: All-time summary card
subDeliverables.description: Summary card at the top of the Juanes page showing total deposits from Ivonne (green), total expenses for Ivonne (red), net balance, and record counts.
acceptanceCriteria: Deposits total displayed in green with + prefix
Expenses total displayed in red with - prefix
Net balance colored green/red based on sign
Deposit and expense counts shown

subDeliverables.title: Year selector and yearly summary
subDeliverables.description: Chevron-based year navigation (min/max derived from data) with a 3-column summary card showing yearly deposits, expenses, and net.
acceptanceCriteria: Year selector with left/right chevron buttons
Buttons disabled at min/max year boundaries
Yearly summary shows deposits, expenses, net in 3-column grid
Values update when year changes

subDeliverables.title: Monthly breakdown table
subDeliverables.description: 12-row table showing deposits, expenses, and net per month for the selected year, with a totals footer row. Data computed client-side from the full dataset using useMemo.
acceptanceCriteria: One row per month (January–December)
Columns: Month, Deposits (green), Expenses (red), Net (green/red)
Footer row with yearly totals
Table updates when year selector changes
Responsive overflow handling

subDeliverables.title: Access restriction (Juanes only)
subDeliverables.description: Sidebar and mobile nav show 'Juanes' link at /juanes only when display_name includes 'juanes'. Ivonne and all other users see nothing.
acceptanceCriteria: Sidebar shows Juanes link only for Juanes
Mobile nav More menu shows Juanes link only for Juanes
isMoreActive array includes /juanes path
Ivonne no longer sees a Deposits link
Other users see no additional nav items
